Class: Capacity

Label: Capacity

Description: Broad statements describing what a centre can do or provide—capturing the scale, availability, or scope of its facilities and services. Capacities may be expressed quantitatively (e.g., “Trains up to 100 people per month,” “Operates three BSL-3 laboratories”) or qualitatively (e.g., “Provides 24/7 crisis-room support,” “Delivers customised emergency response plans”)

Object Properties:
- isCapacityOf -> TrainingCentre

Datatype Properties:
- None

metadata.label: Capacity
metadata.description: Broad statements describing what a centre can do or provide—capturing the scale, availability, or scope of its facilities and services. Capacities may be expressed quantitatively (e.g., “Trains up to 100 people per month,” “Operates three BSL-3 laboratories”) or qualitatively (e.g., “Provides 24/7 crisis-room support,” “Delivers customised emergency response plans”)

Class: Facility

Object Properties:
- isFacilityOf -> Organisation
- isFacilityRequiredBy -> Service
- isFacilityWhereScenarioOccurs -> Scenario

Datatype Properties:
- None

metadata.label: Facility
metadata.description: Physical infrastructure and resources owned by the Training Centre that support training, exercises, and simulations related to hazardous incidents. Class: Incident

- isIncidentBasisFor -> Scenario
- isIncidentTackledBy -> TrainingCentre

Datatype Properties:
- None

metadata.label: Incident

text:
Class: Technology

Label: Technology

Description: Technologies used in CBRN contexts, classified into two main categories: Detection–Identification–Monitoring (DIM) and Decontamination (DECON). Each technology is characterised by its type (e.g., spectrometry) and its principle of operation (e.g., Tandem Mass Spectrometry MS/MS), following the STACCATO taxonomy. Technologies are linked to the relevant threat type (chemical, biological, toxin) and include information such as Technology Readiness Level (TRL)

Object Properties:
- hasDomainOfUse -> DomainOfUse
- hasTRL -> TRLEnumeration
- isTechnologyTrainedIn -> TechnologyTraining
- isTechnologyUsedBy -> Organisation

Datatype Properties:
- hasPrinciple -> string
- hasTechnologyType -> string

metadata.label: Technology
metadata.description: Technologies used in CBRN contexts, classified into two main categories: Detection–Identification–Monitoring (DIM) and Decontamination (DECON). Each technology is characterised by its type (e.g., spectrometry) and its principle of operation (e.g., Tandem Mass Spectrometry MS/MS), following the STACCATO taxonomy. Technologies are linked to the relevant threat type (chemical, biological, toxin) and include information such as Technology Readiness Level (TRL)
